title: pourthiaea villosa
intro: Pourthiaea villosa, also known as the hairy pourthiaea, is a plant species in the family Annonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pourthiaea villosa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea or tincture, can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
